tag: A global leader in kitchen and bath design for over 150 years. From luxury faucets and intelligent toilets to designer sinks and shower systems.
about: Kohler Co., founded in 1873 in Kohler, Wisconsin, is one of the world's oldest and most respected names in kitchen and bath design. With a mission rooted in "Gracious Living," Kohler has spent over 150 years crafting products that combine bold design with cutting-edge engineering.

In India, Kohler has rapidly grown since its 2006 entry, establishing a strong presence in the luxury and premium bathroom segments. The company operates a manufacturing facility in Jhagadia, Gujarat, and has over 1,000 retail touchpoints.
Kohler India serves the residential, hospitality, and commercial segments with a portfolio spanning bathroom fixtures, kitchen sinks and faucets, shower systems, and smart home products.

timeline.t: John Michael Kohler founded the company in Wisconsin. Created the first enameled cast-iron bathtub.
Introduced the Bold Look of Kohler campaign, redefining bathroom fixtures as design objects.
Entered the Indian market. Opened first Kohler Experience Center in Mumbai.
Launched the Kohler Numi intelligent toilet in India with touchless controls and ambient lighting.
Expanded to 1,000+ retail touchpoints across India. Launched Kohler Konnect smart home ecosystem.
